description:
Bottom fragment of a resolution made by a community in provincial Egypt, dealing with the relations with Muslim authorities. Dated: 2 Sivan 1519 Seleucid = 19 May 1208 CE. A dozen signatures are preserved: Yosef b. Menashshe; Netanʾel b. Yosef; Netanʾel b. Daniʾel; Avraham b. Hillel; Shemuʾel b. Nissim; Yakhin b. Netanʾel; [...] b. Yeshuʿa; Menaḥem b. Mevorakh; Sar Shalom [...]; Yoshiyya b. Moshe; Hillel b. Moshe ha-Kohen; ʿEli b. Natan.

On verso there is a grocery list in Arabic script and Greek/Coptic numerals as well as what may be a filing note for the document on recto ("masṭūr al-kanīs").
description_he: תחתית החלטה קהילתית ממצרים, 19 במאי 1208. שתים עשרה חתימות על ויסות יחסים עם שלטונות מוסלמים.
